'''jachate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:asearch|asearch]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-ch-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:asearch|asearch]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| jachate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:jachate|jachate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:jachatesher|jachatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jachatesherĂ«m|jachatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jachatero|jachatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:jachateshĂ«|jachateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jachateshĂ«m|jachateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijachatero|gokijachatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokijachateshĂ«|gokijachateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijachateshĂ«m|gokijachateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gojachankerom|gojachankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojachankeshĂ«|gojachankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojachankeshĂ«m|gojachankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gojachankeya|gojachankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jachaterom|jachaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jachatemu|jachatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:jachateya|jachateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijachaterom|gokijachaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijachatemu|gokijachatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokijachateya|gokijachateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:jachachate|jachachate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:jachachatesher|jachachatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jachachatesherĂ«m|jachachatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jachachatero|jachachatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:jachachateshĂ«|jachachateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jachachateshĂ«m|jachachateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijachachatero|gokijachachatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokijachachateshĂ«|gokijachachateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijachachateshĂ«m|gokijachachateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gojachachankerom|gojachachankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojachachankeshĂ«|gojachachankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojachachankeshĂ«m|gojachachankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gojachachankeya|gojachachankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jachachaterom|jachachaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jachachatemu|jachachatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:jachachateya|jachachateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijachachaterom|gokijachachaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijachachatemu|gokijachachatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokijachachateya|gokijachachateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:jĂŠchĂŠte|jĂŠchĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:jĂŠchĂŠtesher|jĂŠchĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jĂŠchĂŠtesherĂ«m|jĂŠchĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jĂŠchĂŠtero|jĂŠchĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:jĂŠchĂŠteshĂ«|jĂŠchĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jĂŠchĂŠteshĂ«m|jĂŠchĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijĂŠchĂŠtero|gokijĂŠchĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokijĂŠchĂŠteshĂ«|gokijĂŠchĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijĂŠchĂŠteshĂ«m|gokijĂŠchĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gojĂŠchĂŠnkerom|gojĂŠchĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojĂŠchĂŠnkeshĂ«|gojĂŠchĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojĂŠchĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gojĂŠchĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gojĂŠchĂŠnkeya|gojĂŠchĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jĂŠchĂŠterom|jĂŠchĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jĂŠchĂŠtemu|jĂŠchĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:jĂŠchĂŠteya|jĂŠchĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijĂŠchĂŠterom|gokijĂŠchĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijĂŠchĂŠtemu|gokijĂŠchĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokijĂŠchĂŠteya|gokijĂŠchĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:jafchafte|jafchafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:jafchaftesher|jafchaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jafchaftesherĂ«m|jafchaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jafchaftero|jafchaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:jafchafteshĂ«|jafchafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jafchafteshĂ«m|jafchafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijafchaftero|gokijafchaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokijafchafteshĂ«|gokijafchafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijafchafteshĂ«m|gokijafchafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gojafchafnkerom|gojafchafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojafchafnkeshĂ«|gojafchafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojafchafnkeshĂ«m|gojafchafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gojafchafnkeya|gojafchafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jafchafterom|jafchafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jafchaftemu|jafchaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:jafchafteya|jafchafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijafchafterom|gokijafchafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijafchaftemu|gokijafchaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokijafchafteya|gokijafchafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
